bns:Component.name: HROpsConsole - Get Employees
bns:Component.bns:description: Returns the full employee directory with system cross-reference data for HR Ops Console

message.msgTxt: '{"employees":[{"id":"E001","name":"Marcus Chen","email":"m.chen@acme.com","dept":"Engineering","title":"Senior Engineer","manager":"Linda Park","location":"Austin, TX","status":"Active","startDate":"2019-03-12","salary":135000,"riskLevel":"Low","systems":{"hris":{"dept":"Engineering","salary":135000},"payroll":{"dept":"Engineering","salary":135000},"benefits":{"enrolled":true,"plan":"PPO Gold"},"performance":{"lastReview":"2024-01-15","rating":4.2},"engagement":{"score":78}},"complianceIssues":0,"activeCases":0},{"id":"E002","name":"Priya Patel","email":"p.patel@acme.com","dept":"Marketing","title":"Marketing Director","manager":"James Wilson","location":"New York, NY","status":"Active","startDate":"2020-07-22","salary":145000,"riskLevel":"Medium","systems":{"hris":{"dept":"Marketing","salary":145000},"payroll":{"dept":"Marketing Ops","salary":145000},"benefits":{"enrolled":true,"plan":"HMO Silver"},"performance":{"lastReview":"2024-02-10","rating":3.8},"engagement":{"score":62}},"complianceIssues":3,"activeCases":1},{"id":"E003","name":"Jordan Williams","email":"j.williams@acme.com","dept":"Finance","title":"Financial Analyst","manager":"Sarah Kim","location":"Chicago, IL","status":"Active","startDate":"2021-11-05","salary":95000,"riskLevel":"High","systems":{"hris":{"dept":"Finance","salary":95000},"payroll":{"dept":"Finance","salary":92000},"benefits":{"enrolled":false,"plan":null},"performance":{"lastReview":"2023-08-30","rating":2.9},"engagement":{"score":41}},"complianceIssues":4,"activeCases":2},{"id":"E004","name":"Amanda
